## Pull Request Checklist

Before submitting a pull request, please ensure the following:

- [ ] I have read the [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md) documents.
- [ ] My code passes all linter and formatting rules (`pnpm check`).
- [ ] My code passes all architectural tests (`pnpm test`).
- [ ] I have generated a changeset (`pnpm exec changeset`) if this PR alters the CLI output or behavior.

## Description

Please describe your changes, the problem you're solving, and the rationale behind your technical decisions.
